description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstract representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and warped limbs and body. The figure's arms are stretched out horizontally, giving the impression of a T-pose, but the proportions are extremely exaggerated and unnatural. The head is visible at the center, but the facial features are not discernible due to the distortion. The lower body and legs are also elongated and twisted, making it difficult to identify specific anatomical details. The surface texture is glossy and reflective, with some areas appearing metallic or plastic-like. The overall form is not realistic and seems to result from a scanning or rendering error, making it challenging to identify clothing or accessories.
description: A highly distorted, abstract adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and a glossy, reflective surface. The form is warped and lacks realistic anatomical detail.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's outstretched arms and central head, with the body appearing wide and flat.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the extreme elongation and twisting of the limbs and torso, emphasizing the warped geometry.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and the stretched arms, with the lower body appearing narrow and distorted.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the twisting and reflective surface, with the figure's form appearing even more abstract.
attribute_posture: arms outstretched in a T-pose, body highly distorted
